Your content is ready for Google.
Is it ready for ChatGPT?

AI-powered search engines cite your content differently than traditional search. GeoOpt audits every page against the latest AI citation research and gives you an actionable score in seconds.

Start free — no credit card Watch demo

Trusted by content teams at

  • Stripe
  • Vercel
  • Datadog
  • Figma
  • Linear

How it works

1. Connect your content

Point GeoOpt at your markdown files, HTML pages, or CMS. We index everything in seconds.

2. Get your GEO score

Every page gets a 0–100 score across five dimensions: structure, statistics, citations, quotes, and clarity.

3. Fix what matters

We rank recommendations by impact. Fix the top two items and your score typically improves by 15–20 points.

One platform, every AI engine

  • ChatGPT / GPT-4o
  • Claude (Anthropic)
  • Google AI Overviews
  • Perplexity
